title: Smart Classrooms
description: State-of-the-art smart classrooms equipped with digital projectors, interactive whiteboards, and audio-visual aids for an immersive learning experience.

title: Computer Lab
description: Modern computer laboratory with high-speed internet connectivity and the latest hardware, enabling students to develop essential digital skills.

title: Science Lab
description: Well-equipped science laboratories for Physics, Chemistry, and Biology with advanced instruments for practical experiments and research.

title: Library
description: A vast library housing thousands of books, journals, and digital resources, fostering a culture of reading and self-directed learning.

title: Playground
description: Spacious playground with dedicated areas for various outdoor activities, promoting physical fitness and team spirit among students.

title: Sports
description: Comprehensive sports program with facilities for cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, and athletics with professional coaching.

title: CCTV Campus
description: Complete CCTV surveillance across the campus ensuring the safety and security of all students and staff throughout the day.

title: Clean Drinking Water
description: RO purified drinking water stations installed at multiple locations across the campus for safe and clean hydration.

title: Cultural Activities
description: Regular cultural programs, competitions, and events that nurture creativity, confidence, and artistic expression in students.
